title: Not vanila
description: Not vanila is a combination of modpack which is not vanila....
body:
# **Not Vanilla – For Those Who Want to Explore Beyond Regular Minecraft**

With a combination of different mods, players can enjoy new aspects of Minecraft like never before.

## Dangerous Animals – Watch Out!

![Wildlife update](https://i.imgur.com/cuHRueB.png) ![Elephant](https://i.imgur.com/ZtiszzQ.png)

## Powerful Beasts Protecting Treasures!

![The Sleeping Beast](https://i.imgur.com/U886afj.png) ![The Sun Boss](https://i.imgur.com/5tJOqjz.png)

Be careful in the Nether too!
![Nether Wildlife](https://i.imgur.com/A9pRTgS.png)

## But Don’t Worry – We’ve Got You Covered

With guns and the gunbench:
![Glock](https://i.imgur.com/9UtOTb7.png) ![AR](https://i.imgur.com/QCeDx0z.png)

**There are many more gun types and items in the game – explore them all!**

## Relax and Decorate After a Long Day

Enjoy plushies and home decorations to unwind:
![Plushie](https://i.imgur.com/zSpwBv3.png)

## Collect Items and Navigate Easily

Use different backpacks and waystones:
![Backpack](https://i.imgur.com/EJcrH8v.png) ![Waystone](https://i.imgur.com/Ms1FEdV.png)

There’s even more to discover – explore the modpack and share your experience with us on Discord:
[Join our Discord](https://discord.gg/DYnWT3ytZp)
